translations.en: Mole
translations.zh: 鼴鼠

translations.en: a coarse looking individual
translations.zh: 一個相貌粗糙的人

translations.en: , digging in the dirt with his bare hands
translations.zh: ，正用雙手徒手挖土

translations.en: "Now, now. You can't be bringing bodies out here without no reservations."
translations.zh: 「好了好了。你不能就這樣沒預約就把遺體帶來這裡。」

translations.en: "Go see me master Glen about having a funeral first."
translations.zh: 「先去找我主人葛倫辦個葬禮手續吧。」

translations.en: "Old penny pincher says he's going to pay me?"
translations.zh: 「那個老吝嗇鬼說他要付我錢？」

translations.en: "I'll believe it when I have the coins in me hand."
translations.zh: 「等錢放到我手心裡再說。」

translations.en: "Aye, maybe there'd 'ave been extra for shovel and such in my pay, if the old skinflint had ever remembered to pay me!"
translations.zh: 「是啊，要是那個老鐵公雞記得付我工錢，說不定還有額外的鏟子費哩！」
translations.note: 英語俚口語保留鄉土氣

translations.en: "I'd have been glad to get a new shovel! Believe me, I knows how to pick out a good one, too."
translations.zh: 「我巴不得拿到一把新鏟子！你信我，我還挺懂得挑好鏟子的。」

translations.en: "But how'm I supposed to pay for it, you just ask him that!"
translations.zh: 「但我哪來的錢買？你去問問他！」

translations.en: Mole listens, a bit impatiently.
translations.zh: 鼴鼠聽著，有些不耐煩。

translations.en: *"He gave me a shovel, all right - cheapest shovel I ever saw in all my years in the business!"*
translations.zh: *「他是給了我一把鏟子，沒錯——但那是我入行這麼多年見過最劣等的鏟子！」*

translations.en: "Tell 'im it broke the third day I tried usin' it."
translations.zh: 「告訴他，用了第三天就斷了。」

translations.en: You tell him what Glen said.
translations.zh: 你把葛倫說的話轉告他。

translations.en: *"Wants 'is graves dug, does he? Well, you can tell old zombie-face I'd do a lot better if I had a shovel!"
translations.zh: *「他要挖墳，是嗎？那你告訴那個殭屍臉老頭，給我一把鏟子我能挖得好多了！」
translations.note: * 控制符保留，zombie-face 俚稱保留諧謔感

translations.en: "Hello. If I be speaking with ye, I'd best not be digging at the same time."
translations.zh: 「哈囉。若要和你說話，我最好暫停挖土。」

translations.en: "I be Mole."
translations.zh: 「俺是鼴鼠。」

translations.en: "Digging's been in me family for generations."
translations.zh: 「挖土這行在俺家已傳了好幾代了。」

translations.en: "If you take away enough dirt, a grave's what's left."
translations.zh: 「把土挖夠多，剩下的就是個墳。」

translations.en: "After they has a @funeral, I puts all the dirt back again."
translations.zh: 「辦完@funeral葬禮之後，我再把土填回去。」

translations.en: "Funerals aren't me trade. I know plenty about @dirt, though."
translations.zh: 「葬禮不是俺的行當。但俺對@dirt泥土可是很在行。」

translations.en: "I knows all the different @kinds of dirt by heart."
translations.zh: 「俺對各種@kinds不同的泥土如數家珍。」

translations.en: "Learned 'em from me father."
translations.zh: 「是俺爹教俺的。」

translations.en: "I @dig @graves for me master, @Glen."
translations.zh: 「俺幫俺主人@Glen挖@graves墳，就這活。」

translations.en: "What 'ave you got I could want? All I needs in me life is a good @shovel."
translations.zh: 「你有啥是俺想要的？俺這輩子只需要一把好@shovel鏟子。」

translations.en: "'Tis the @tool of me trade."
translations.zh: 「那是俺的@tool吃飯傢伙。」

translations.en: "Me father said a good shovel is more important than a good @wife."
translations.zh: 「俺爹說過，好鏟子比好@wife娘子更重要。」

translations.en: "That's what you look for after you've got a good @shovel."
translations.zh: 「等你有了好鏟子，再找@wife娘子也不遲。」

translations.en: "I'll not speak with 'im, the way he treats me."
translations.zh: 「他那樣對我，俺才不和他說話。」

translations.en: "But if you sees him, tell him I could dig these graves better if I had a @shovel!"
translations.zh: 「但你見到他，告訴他，給俺一把@shovel鏟子，俺能挖得更好！」

translations.en: "He's a strange one... Nobody knows what he keeps in that back room of 'is."
translations.zh: 「他是個怪人……沒人知道他那後房間藏著啥。」

translations.en: "Oh, going away, are ye? Let me know when ye return, so I'll know 'tis time to speak with ye again."*
translations.zh: 「哦，你要走了？回來時知會俺一聲，這樣俺就知道又可以和你說話了。」*

translations.en: He returns to his digging.
translations.zh: 他繼續挖土。

translations.en: "I think ye'd best ask someone smarter than me."
translations.zh: 「俺尋思你最好去問個比俺聰明的人。」

translations.en: "Oh, ye've brought a shovel with ye! Is it for me?"
translations.zh: 「哦，你帶了把鏟子來！是給俺的嗎？」

translations.en: "Too bad. I really need one."
translations.zh: 「可惜。俺真的需要一把。」

translations.en: "Thank ye very much! And 'tis not even my birthday!"
translations.zh: 「多謝多謝！今日又不是俺的生日！」

translations.en: "Let me tell you this - keep an eye on old Glen."
translations.zh: 「俺告訴你——要盯緊老葛倫。」

translations.en: "They say not all of the bodies end up where they're supposed to..."
translations.zh: 「聽說有些遺體不一定到了該去的地方……」
translations.note: 暗示 Glen 的秘密交易

translations.en: "You know, 'e was supposed to have paid me for a new shovel, and then you wouldn't have 'ad to go to so much trouble."
translations.zh: 「你知道，他本來應該付錢讓俺買把新鏟子的，那樣你也不用費這麼大勁。」

translator_notes: 鼴鼠為鄉土口音的掘墓人，只在乎鏟子，語氣帶有英語底層工人方言。譯文保留「俺」「吃飯傢伙」等台灣傳統粗俗口語。Glen 的後房秘密（遺體去向不明）為隱藏線索。zombie-face 俚稱保留幽默感。
